subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of him who hearkened unto the Call when it was raised betwixt earth and heaven, and announceth unto all that which hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان القلم الاعلی یذکر من سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع بین الارض و السماء و یبشر الکل بما اشرق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @station of the Manifestation of God
